seo.title: The GripAble Sensor — One Sensor, Three Use Cases | Able Care
seo.description: Clinical-grade hand-strength sensor developed at Imperial College London. Powers grip strength testing, fall risk screening, and neuro-rehabilitation in one device.

blocks.headline: The GripAble Sensor
blocks.subtitle: Developed at Imperial College London in a partnership between the departments of medicine and bioengineering.

cards.title: Grip Strength
cards.body: Utilizes the GripAble sensor and the Able Assess app.

cards.title: Fall Risk Screening
cards.body: Utilizes the GripAble sensor, the Able Assess app, the carry pouch, and a measuring tape.

cards.title: Neuro-Rehabilitation
cards.body: Utilizes the GripAble sensor and the Able Rehab app.

blocks.heading: Setting the Standard
blocks.subheading: The research speaks for itself. Learn about what sets us apart.

segments.title: Immediate, In-App Calibration
segments.description: No need to send the product away to re-calibrate.

segments.title: Accurate
segments.description: Proven accuracy across users and assessments.

segments.title: Robust
segments.description: Maintains accuracy even after bumps and jostles.

segments.title: Sensitive
segments.description: Senses the smallest of movements through to hundreds of pounds of force.

blocks.headline: GripAble Sensor Features
blocks.description: Everything you need for clinical-grade hand-strength measurement, in a single rugged, pocket-sized device.
blocks.imageAlt: The GripAble sensor with annotated features

bulletPoints.text: Locking Button — used to switch grip modes. Squeeze and hold the GripAble, then push down the lock button.
Strap Hooks — six attachment points for silicon straps.
Grip Plate — use your fingers to squeeze the plate.
Battery LED — indicator for battery status (see table below).
Lanyard Hook — attachment point for wrist lanyard.
Charging Port — magnetic connector for charging.
Connection LED — indicator for app pairing status (see table below).

blocks.heading: Battery LED
blocks.body:
Indicator of battery status.

ColorStatus
GreenFully charged
YellowCharging
OrangeBattery OK
RedBattery low

blocks.heading: Connection LED
blocks.body:
Indicator of connection with the app.

LightStatus
No lightDevice is asleep
Flashing bluePairing mode — device is ready to connect
Solid blueConnection established

blocks.heading: See the GripAble sensor in your workflow.
blocks.bodyText: 20 minutes with a clinician who has run it across grip strength, fall risk screening, and neuro-rehab.
